---
title: "comparative-yield"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{comparative-yield}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Setup

```{r setup}
library("tidyverse")
```

## Load Data

```{r load data}
df <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(
  normalizePath("./data-raw/vgs-export.xlsx"),
  sheet = "DWR (by quadrat)")
print(df)
```

## Wrangle

```{r print column names}
colnames(df)
```

```{r}
# df %>% dplyr::pull("Ancestry")

df %>% slice_head()
```


```{r remove columns}
df %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Allotment =
                  stringr::str_extract(Ancestry,
                                       ".*(?=>)")) %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Allotment)
```

## Analysis



## Plot

```{r setup}
library(grazeR)
```
